violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as marinated raw shrimp) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as deli sandwiches) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Various bakery items (muffins and scones) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door cooks reach-in and the 2-door staff reach-in units. refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The kitchen hand sink by the hot service line and the ice machine was observed to be draining slowly and is not in good repair. Physical facilities including plumbing and fixtures shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The following areas in the kitchen area are in poor repair: -The wall coating near the 3-bay sink - The flooring material near drain by tilt kettle - The flooring material in the dish room was observed to separating at the section seams and water was observed pooling underneath. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the dish room for the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Raw animal foods (such as bacon strips) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as prepared foods) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw bacon was moved during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Muffins and cookies are packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment is to post signage with nutritional information and list of allergens for each item. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live activity near produce area and prep area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control. No food items observed to be affected. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The pot/pan dishwasher located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Physical facilities shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door sliding Pepsi cooler by the office, the 2-door victory reach-in unit, the production walk-in cooler, and the 1-door reach-in unit by prep sink. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Sliding arm of deli slicer -Refrigerator door gaskets of Victory 2-Door -Refrigerator door gaskets of Pepsi 2-Door have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment and physical facilities shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The following areas in the kitchen area are in poor repair: -The ceiling tiles above the cookline near 3-bay sink and pot washer were observed missing -The wall coating near the 3-bay sink - The flooring material near drain by tilt kettle - The flooring material in the dish room was observed to separating at the section seams The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Deli slicer was disassembled and cleaned during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Scrambled eggs and french toast was observed held at temperature ranging from 88-100 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were placed into steamtable less than 2 hours prior to inspection and were reheated to 208 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The first well on the tray line steamtable located in the kitchen is not in good repair. Steam well was observed not functioning when power dial was turned to the on position and selected temperature. Establishment shall not use first well on steamtable until unit is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The individual cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Chicken Breast, Chicken Nuggets, Pureed Chop Suey and Tomato Soup were observed held at (118-129) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were reheated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

Deli slicer blade was observed in poor repair. Slicer was taken out of service during time of inspection. Slicer must be properly adjusted/ repaired/ replaced prior to use. Per PIC, attached blade during time of inspection was the replacement blade. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
Handwashing signs were lacking in restrooms that staff use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

Raw animal foods (such as shelled eggs and seasoned raw beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as chicken noodle soup) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Boiled eggs, shredded carrots, puddings and fruit cups were observed held at (45-47) degrees Fahrenheit in the produce walk-in cooler. Packaged grab and go foods were observed held at (54) degrees Fahrenheit in the cafeteria open air case. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Parcooked salmon and chicken were observed in the walk-in cooler. Establishment is not permitted to parcook animal proteins until variance for parcooking is submitted and approved by RIDOH CFP. Establishment instructed to cease process. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Styrofoam cup observed in iced tea in walk-in cooler. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Deli slicer blade was observed with some chips and nicks. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Equipment taken out of service during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

1. Produce walk-in cooler was observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 45-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Service was called and responded during time of inspection. 2. Grab and go open air case was observed at an ambient temperature of 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment was taken out of service during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
